message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "WebSite" as WebSite #D3D6E9
participant "Server" as Server #D3D6E9
database phonebook #D3D6E9

User ->> WebSite : select contact\n\nclick button\n\"DeleteContact\"\nactivate WebSite
    activate WebSite 
        WebSite->>+Server: deleteContact() \n        
            Server-->+phonebook: Update()\n            
                return ok
            
            deactivate phonebook
        
        return ok
    
deactivate WebSite 

note over user,user:hidden note 1


' second part of sequence...



User --> +Website:getAllContacts()    
   Website-->>+server:\findall ()   
      server<--+Database:<contactsList>\n      
return Contactslist  
@enduml
